# fhhs-skills Codex adapters

These wrappers let Codex load the existing Claude-oriented skills from `.claude/skills/`.
Keep `.codex/` and `.claude/` directories adjacent (these adapters reference `../../../.claude/skills/...`).
Use the Codex skill name in prompts (or your Codex skill picker if available).

| Codex skill | Original Claude command | Source file |
|---|---|---|
| `fh-auto` | `/fh:auto` | `.claude/skills/auto/SKILL.md` |
| `fh-build` | `/fh:build` | `.claude/skills/build/SKILL.md` |
